rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE PEGGY BARTEL LIVING TRUST, DATED APRIL 17, 2006
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Petitioner David Bartel, Trustee Of The Peggy Bartel Living Trust, Dated April 17, 2006 For Preference In Setting This Case For Trial
rulings.Rulings: UPDATED TENTATIVE RULING This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Stephen M. Murphy. Before the court is Motion Of Petitioner David Bartel, Trustee Of The Peggy Bartel Living Trust, Dated April 17, 2006 For Preference In Setting This Case For Trial. The moving party's Motion for Preference is GRANTED. The Petitioner's age, waning health, and substantial interest in the litigation that is at risk of being prejudiced if this proceeding is delayed satisfy the elements of Code of Civil Procedure section 36. The trial date is set for October 2, 2023 in the Department of the Presiding Judge, Department 206. The moving party shall lodge with the clerk in Department 204 a proposed order consistent with this tentative ruling, as published above, by the time set for this hearing. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the court day before the hearing. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
